'''kabïfdhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphette|nymphette]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphette|nymphette]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| kabïfdhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kæbïfdhïfth || kæbïfdhïfj || kæbïfdhïfsh || kæbïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kabïfbïfdhïfth || kabïfbïfdhïfj || kabïfbïfdhïfsh || kabïfbïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kabïfdhïfth || kabïfdhïfj || kabïfdhïfsh || kabïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kabïffdhïffth || kabïffdhïffj || kabïffdhïffsh || kabïffdhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kabïfdhïfïf || kabïfdhïfïf || kabïfdhïfïf || kabïfdhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || kabïfdhïfth || kabïfdhïfj || kabïfdhïfsh || kabïfdhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kabïfdhïfïfl || kabïfdhïfïfl || kabïfdhïfïfl || kabïfdhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kabïfdhïfïfïf || kabïfdhïfïfïf || kabïfdhïfïfïf || kabïfdhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || kabïfdhïfïfn || kabïfdhïfïfn || kabïfdhïfïfn || kabïfdhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kabïfdhïfïforo || kabïfdhïfïforo || kabïfdhïfïforo || kabïfdhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
